nasb.text: When all things are subjected to Him, then the Son Himself also will be subjected to the One who subjected all things to Him, so that God may be all in all.

esv.text: When all things are subjected to him, then the Son himself will also be subjected to him who put all things in subjection under him, that God may be all in all.

cnv.text: 等到萬物都服了他，那時子自己也要服那位叫萬物服他的，好使　神在萬有之上。

ccb.text: 到了万物都归服基督以后，圣子基督也要归服那使万物归服祂的上帝，使上帝做万物的主宰。

csbs.text: 当万有都服从他的时候，子自己也要服从那位使万有都服从他的，这样神就是万有中的万有。
